files.mg_02539.v:
module mg_02539(funct, aluop, alucontrol, signd, multseld);
input [5:0] funct; 
  input [3:0] aluop; 
  output reg [2:0] alucontrol; 
  output reg signd, multseld; 
  always @(*) begin 
  case(aluop) 
  4'b0000: begin alucontrol <= 3'b010; signd <= 1'b1; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  4'b0010: begin 
  case(funct) 
  6'b100000: begin alucontrol <= 3'b010; signd <= 1'b1; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  6'b100001: begin alucontrol <= 3'b010; signd <= 1'b0; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  6'b100010: begin alucontrol <= 3'b110; signd <= 1'b1; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  6'b100011: begin alucontrol <= 3'b110; signd <= 1'b0; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  6'b100100: begin alucontrol <= 3'b000; signd <= 1'b1; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  6'b100101: begin alucontrol <= 3'b001; signd <= 1'b1; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  6'b101010: begin alucontrol <= 3'b111; signd <= 1'b1; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  6'b101011: begin alucontrol <= 3'b111; signd <= 1'b0; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  6'b100110: begin alucontrol <= 3'b011; signd <= 1'b1; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  6'b011000: begin alucontrol <= 3'bxxx; signd <= 1'b1; multseld <= 1'b1; end 
  6'b011001: begin alucontrol <= 3'bxxx; signd <= 1'b0; multseld <= 1'b1; end 
  default: begin alucontrol <= 3'bxxx; signd <= 1'b0; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  endcase 
  end 
  4'b0001: begin alucontrol <= 3'b110; signd <= 1'b1; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  4'b0011: begin alucontrol <= 3'b001; signd <= 1'b1; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  4'b0100: begin alucontrol <= 3'b000; signd <= 1'b1; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  4'b0101: begin alucontrol <= 3'b011; signd <= 1'b1; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  4'b0110: begin alucontrol <= 3'b111; signd <= 1'b1; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  4'b0111: begin alucontrol <= 3'b011; signd <= 1'b0; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  4'b1000: begin alucontrol <= 3'b111; signd <= 1'b0; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  default: begin alucontrol <= 3'bxxx; signd <= 1'b0; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  endcase 
  end 
 endmodule

  4'b1000: begin alucontrol <= 3'b111; signd <= 1'b0; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  default: begin alucontrol <= 3'bxxx; signd <= 1'b0; multseld <= 1'b0; end 
  endcase

module autovcoder_061687 (
    input  [31:0] io_in_a,
    output [31:0] io_out_frac,
    output [31:0] io_out
);
  wire [22:0] leadingOne_io_in;  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 890:28]
  wire [4:0] leadingOne_io_out;  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 890:28]
  wire [7:0] exp = io_in_a[30:23];  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 884:19]
  wire [22:0] mant = io_in_a[22:0];  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 886:20]
  wire [23:0] whole_mant = {1'h1, mant};  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 888:28]
  wire [7:0] subres = exp - 8'h7f;  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 894:21]
  wire [7:0] _expr_T_1 = 8'h17 - subres;  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 895:41]
  wire [23:0] _expr_T_2 = whole_mant >> _expr_T_1;  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 895:26]
  wire [277:0] _GEN_3 = {{255'd0}, mant};  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 897:27]
  wire [277:0] _firstshiftf_T = _GEN_3 << subres;  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 897:27]
  wire [4:0] _new_exp_T_1 = 5'h17 - leadingOne_io_out;  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 900:39]
  wire [4:0] _new_exp_T_3 = _new_exp_T_1 + 5'h1;  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 900:59]
  wire [6:0] _GEN_5 = {{2'd0}, _new_exp_T_3};  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 900:25]
  wire [6:0] _new_exp_T_5 = 7'h7f - _GEN_5;  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 900:25]
  wire [22:0] firstshiftf = _firstshiftf_T[22:0];  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 896:29 897:19]
  wire [53:0] _GEN_4 = {{31'd0}, firstshiftf};  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 902:31]
  wire [53:0] _new_mant_T_4 = _GEN_4 << _new_exp_T_3;  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 902:31]
  wire [7:0] new_exp = {{1'd0}, _new_exp_T_5};  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 899:25 900:15]
  wire [22:0] new_mant = _new_mant_T_4[22:0];  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 901:26 902:16]
  wire [31:0] _result_frac_T_2 = {
    io_in_a[31], new_exp, new_mant
  };  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 903:47]
  wire [7:0] _GEN_6 = {{3'd0}, _new_exp_T_3};  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 909:22]
  wire [7:0] new_exp_1 = exp - _GEN_6;  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 909:22]
  wire [53:0] _GEN_7 = {{31'd0}, mant};  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 911:24]
  wire [53:0] _new_mant_T_9 = _GEN_7 << _new_exp_T_3;  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 911:24]
  wire [22:0] new_mant_1 = _new_mant_T_9[22:0];  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 910:26 911:16]
  wire [31:0] _result_frac_T_5 = {
    io_in_a[31], new_exp_1, new_mant_1
  };  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 912:47]
  wire [31:0] _GEN_0 = exp < 8'h7f ? io_in_a : _result_frac_T_5; // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 904:29 905:19 912:19]
  wire _GEN_1 = exp < 8'h7f ? 1'h0 : 1'h1;  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 882:10 904:29 907:12]
  wire [23:0] _GEN_2 = exp > 8'h7f ? _expr_T_2 : {{23'd0}, _GEN_1}; // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 892:24 895:12]
  leadingOneDetector leadingOne (  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 890:28]
      .io_in (leadingOne_io_in),
      .io_out(leadingOne_io_out)
  );
  assign io_out_frac = exp > 8'h7f ? _result_frac_T_2 : _GEN_0; // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 892:24 903:19]
  assign io_out = {{8'd0}, _GEN_2};  // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 881:20]
  assign leadingOne_io_in = exp > 8'h7f ? firstshiftf : mant; // @[FloatingPointDesigns.scala 891:22 892:24 898:24]
endmodule

files.autovcoder_103535.v:
module autovcoder_103535 #(
    parameter PRIO = 0,  // 0 = Round robin, 1 = Lower ports get priority (see axi_mux)
    parameter AWIDTH = 8,
    parameter DWIDTH = 32,
    parameter FIFO_SIZE = 1,
    parameter NUM_BUSES = 2
) (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input clear,
    input [NUM_BUSES-1:0] in_set_stb,
    input [NUM_BUSES*AWIDTH-1:0] in_set_addr,
    input [NUM_BUSES*DWIDTH-1:0] in_set_data,
    output out_set_stb,
    output [AWIDTH-1:0] out_set_addr,
    output [DWIDTH-1:0] out_set_data,
    input ready
);

  wire [NUM_BUSES*(AWIDTH+DWIDTH)-1:0] i_tdata;

  genvar i;
  generate
    for (i = 0; i < NUM_BUSES; i = i + 1) begin
      assign i_tdata[(i+1)*(AWIDTH+DWIDTH)-1:i*(AWIDTH+DWIDTH)] = {
        in_set_addr[(i+1)*AWIDTH-1:i*AWIDTH], in_set_data[(i+1)*DWIDTH-1:i*DWIDTH]
      };
    end
  endgenerate

  axi_mux #(
      .PRIO(PRIO),
      .WIDTH(AWIDTH + DWIDTH),
      .PRE_FIFO_SIZE($clog2(NUM_BUSES)),
      .POST_FIFO_SIZE(FIFO_SIZE),
      .SIZE(NUM_BUSES)
  ) axi_mux (
      .clk(clk),
      .reset(reset),
      .clear(clear),
      .i_tdata(i_tdata),
      .i_tlast({NUM_BUSES{1'b1}}),
      .i_tvalid(in_set_stb),
      .i_tready(),
      .o_tdata({out_set_addr, out_set_data}),
      .o_tlast(),
      .o_tvalid(out_set_stb),
      .o_tready(ready)
  );

endmodule

      }),

files.origen_058880.v:
module origen_058880(
    input clk_out_seg,
    input reset,
    input [3:0] BCD1,
    input [3:0] BCD2,
    output reg [7:0] An,
    output reg [6:0] Seg
);

reg [3:0] BCD;
reg [1:0] S;

always @(posedge clk_out_seg or negedge reset) begin
    if (!reset) begin
        S <= 2'b00;
    end else begin
        An[7:4] <= 4'b1111;
        case (S)
            2'b01: begin
                An[3:0] <= 4'b1011;
                BCD <= BCD2;
            end
            2'b10: begin
                An[3:0] <= 4'b1101;
                BCD <= BCD1;
            end
            default: begin
                An[3:0] <= 4'b1111;
                BCD <= 4'b0000;
            end
        endcase
        S <= S + 1;
    end
end

always @(*) begin
    case (BCD)
        4'b0000: Seg = 7'b1000000; // 0
        4'b0001: Seg = 7'b1111001; // 1
        4'b0010: Seg = 7'b0100100; // 2
        4'b0011: Seg = 7'b0110000; // 3
        4'b0100: Seg = 7'b0011001; // 4
        4'b0101: Seg = 7'b0010010; // 5
        4'b0110: Seg = 7'b0000010; // 6
        4'b0111: Seg = 7'b1111000; // 7
        4'b1000: Seg = 7'b0000000; // 8
        4'b1001: Seg = 7'b0010000; // 9
        default: Seg = 7'b1111111; // All segments off
    endcase
end

endmodule

files.origen_176730.v:
module origen_176730 #(
  parameter DATA_WIDTH = 8,
  parameter ADDR_WIDTH = 9,
  parameter OUTPUT_REG = "TRUE",
  parameter RAM_INIT_FILE = "",
  parameter RAM_INIT_RADIX = "HEX"
) (
  input wire [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] wdata,
  input wire [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] waddr,
  input wire [ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] raddr,
  input wire we,
  input wire wclk,
  input wire re,
  input wire rclk,
  output reg [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] rdata
);

  // Declare the RAM
  reg [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] ram [0:(1<<ADDR_WIDTH)-1];

  // Initialize the RAM from a file, if specified
  initial begin
    if (RAM_INIT_FILE != "") begin
      $readmemh(RAM_INIT_FILE, ram, 0, (1<<ADDR_WIDTH)-1);
    end
  end

  // Write operation
  always @(posedge wclk) begin
    if (we) begin
      ram[waddr] <= wdata;
    end
  end

  // Read operation
  generate
    if (OUTPUT_REG == "TRUE") begin
      always @(posedge rclk) begin
        if (re) begin
          rdata <= ram[raddr];
        end
      end
    end else begin
      always @(*) begin
        if (re) begin
          rdata = ram[raddr];
        end else begin
          rdata = {DATA_WIDTH{1'b0}};
        end
      end
    end
  endgenerate

endmodule

    output logic [6:0] HEX0, HEX1, HEX2, HEX3, HEX4, HEX5
);

    // LED control
    assign LEDR[0] = SW[9] & SW[8] & SW[7];
    assign LEDR[1] = (SW[9] | SW[8]) & (SW[7] | SW[0]);
    assign LEDR[9:2] = 8'b0;  // Turn off unused LEDs

    // 7-segment display control
    always_comb begin
        case (SW[9:7])
            3'b000: begin
                HEX0 = 7'b1000000;  // 0
                HEX1 = 7'b1111001;  // 1
                HEX2 = 7'b0100100;  // 2
                HEX3 = 7'b0110000;  // 3
                HEX4 = 7'b0011001;  // 4
                HEX5 = 7'b0010010;  // 5
            end
            3'b001: begin
                HEX0 = 7'b0000010;  // 6
                HEX1 = 7'b1111000;  // 7
                HEX2 = 7'b0000000;  // 8
                HEX3 = 7'b0010000;  // 9
                HEX4 = 7'b0001000;  // A
                HEX5 = 7'b0000011;  // b
            end
            3'b011: begin
                HEX0 = 7'b1000110;  // C
                HEX1 = 7'b0100001;  // d
                HEX2 = 7'b0000110;  // E
                HEX3 = 7'b0001110;  // F
                HEX4 = 7'b0111111;  // -
                HEX5 = 7'b1111111;  // (blank)
            end
            3'b100: begin
                HEX0 = 7'b0001100;  // P
                HEX1 = 7'b0011000;  // U
                HEX2 = 7'b0111111;  // -
                HEX3 = 7'b0001100;  // P
                HEX4 = 7'b0011000;  // U
                HEX5 = 7'b0111111;  // -
            end
            3'b101: begin
                HEX0 = 7'b1000111;  // L
                HEX1 = 7'b1000000;  // O
                HEX2 = 7'b1000111;  // L
                HEX3 = 7'b1111111;  // (blank)
                HEX4 = 7'b1111111;  // (blank)
                HEX5 = 7'b1111111;  // (blank)
            end
            3'b110: begin
                HEX0 = 7'b0001100;  // P
                HEX1 = 7'b0001000;  // A
                HEX2 = 7'b0101011;  // n
                HEX3 = 7'b0001000;  // A
                HEX4 = 7'b1000110;  // C
                HEX5 = 7'b0001000;  // A
            end
            default: begin
                HEX0 = 7'b1111111;  // All off
                HEX1 = 7'b1111111;
                HEX2 = 7'b1111111;
                HEX3 = 7'b1111111;
                HEX4 = 7'b1111111;
                HEX5 = 7'b1111111;
            end
        endcase
    end
endmodule

module DE1_SoC_testbench();
    logic [9:0] SW;
    logic [3:0] KEY;
    logic [9:0] LEDR;
    logic [6:0] HEX0, HEX1, HEX2, HEX3, HEX4, HEX5;

    DE1_SoC dut (.*);

    initial begin
        SW[6:1] = 6'b0;
        KEY = 4'b0;
        for (int i = 0; i < 16; i++) begin
            {SW[9:7], SW[0]} = i;
            #10;
        end
    end
endmodule

module origen_135675 (
    input wire SYSCLK,
    input wire CLKDIV,
    input wire RST,
    input wire I_DAT,
    output wire O_DAT,
    output wire T_DAT,
    input wire [7:0] INPUTS,
    output wire [7:0] OUTPUTS
);

    parameter DATA_RATE = "DDR";
    parameter DATA_WIDTH = 8;
    parameter DATA_RATE_TQ = "BUF";
    parameter TRISTATE_WIDTH = 1;
    parameter INTERFACE_TYPE = "NETWORKING";
    parameter NUM_CE = 2;
    parameter BUFR_DIVIDE = "4";
    parameter SIM_DEVICE = "7SERIES";
    parameter LOC = "BUFR_X0Y0";

    wire clk_div;
    wire [7:0] parallel_data;
    wire [7:0] deserialized_data;

    // BUFR instantiation
    BUFR #(
        .BUFR_DIVIDE(BUFR_DIVIDE),
        .SIM_DEVICE(SIM_DEVICE)
    ) BUFR_inst (
        .I(SYSCLK),
        .O(clk_div),
        .CE(1'b1),
        .CLR(1'b0)
    );

    // OSERDES instantiation
    OSERDES2 #(
        .DATA_RATE_OQ(DATA_RATE),
        .DATA_RATE_TQ(DATA_RATE_TQ),
        .DATA_WIDTH(DATA_WIDTH),
        .TRISTATE_WIDTH(TRISTATE_WIDTH)
    ) OSERDES_inst (
        .OQ(O_DAT),
        .TQ(T_DAT),
        .CLK0(SYSCLK),
        .CLK1(1'b0),
        .CLKDIV(clk_div),
        .D1(parallel_data[0]),
        .D2(parallel_data[1]),
        .D3(parallel_data[2]),
        .D4(parallel_data[3]),
        .D5(parallel_data[4]),
        .D6(parallel_data[5]),
        .D7(parallel_data[6]),
        .D8(parallel_data[7]),
        .OCE(1'b1),
        .RST(RST),
        .TRAIN(1'b0),
        .T1(1'b0),
        .T2(1'b0),
        .T3(1'b0),
        .T4(1'b0),
        .TCE(1'b1),
        .SHIFTIN1(1'b1),
        .SHIFTIN2(1'b1),
        .SHIFTIN3(1'b1),
        .SHIFTIN4(1'b1),
        .SHIFTOUT1(),
        .SHIFTOUT2(),
        .SHIFTOUT3(),
        .SHIFTOUT4()
    );

    // ISERDES instantiation
    ISERDES2 #(
        .DATA_RATE(DATA_RATE),
        .DATA_WIDTH(DATA_WIDTH),
        .INTERFACE_TYPE(INTERFACE_TYPE)
    ) ISERDES_inst (
        .D(I_DAT),
        .CE0(1'b1),
        .CLK0(SYSCLK),
        .CLK1(1'b0),
        .IOCE(clk_div),
        .RST(RST),
        .CLKDIV(clk_div),
        .SHIFTIN(1'b0),
        .BITSLIP(1'b0),
        .FABRICOUT(),
        .Q1(deserialized_data[7]),
        .Q2(deserialized_data[6]),
        .Q3(deserialized_data[5]),
        .Q4(deserialized_data[4]),
        .Q5(deserialized_data[3]),
        .Q6(deserialized_data[2]),
        .Q7(deserialized_data[1]),
        .Q8(deserialized_data[0]),
        .SHIFTOUT(),
        .CFB0(),
        .CFB1(),
        .DFB()
    );

    // Connect inputs and outputs
    assign parallel_data = INPUTS;
    assign OUTPUTS = deserialized_data;

endmodule

# Placeholder replaced by verification_tools.run_lec_rtl_remote: TOP_NAME

set_top ${TOP_NAME}

match

exit

files.sec_rtlpp_00550.tcl:
# JasperGold SEC: sequential equivalence (golden vs revised RTL).
# Placeholders replaced by verification_tools.run_sec_remote:
#   rtlpp_00550.v0, rtlpp_00550.v1, rtlpp_00550, clk, -none
set DESIGN_NAME_GOLDEN "rtlpp_00550.v0"
set DESIGN_NAME "rtlpp_00550.v1"
set TOP_NAME "rtlpp_00550"


clear -all
check_sec -analyze -spec -sv ./input/rtl/${DESIGN_NAME_GOLDEN}.v
check_sec -analyze -imp -sv ./input/rtl/${DESIGN_NAME}.v
check_sec -elaborate -spec -top ${TOP_NAME} -disable_auto_bbox
check_sec -elaborate -imp -top ${TOP_NAME} -disable_auto_bbox
# check_sec -setup clock -infer reset -none
check_sec -setup 
check_sec -map -auto
clock clk 
reset -none
check_sec -gen
# check_sec -prove -strategy design_style -design_style_type clock_gating
# check_sec -prove
check_sec -prove -strategy proof

files.autovcoder_033414.v:
module autovcoder_033414 #(
    // target ("SIM", "GENERIC", "XILINX", "ALTERA")
    parameter TARGET = "GENERIC",
    // Clock input style ("BUFG", "BUFR", "BUFIO", "BUFIO2")
    // Use BUFR for Virtex-5, Virtex-6, 7-series
    // Use BUFG for Ultrascale
    // Use BUFIO2 for Spartan-6
    parameter CLOCK_INPUT_STYLE = "BUFIO2",
    parameter ENABLE_PADDING = 1,
    parameter MIN_FRAME_LENGTH = 64
) (
    input  wire rst,
    output wire rx_clk,
    output wire rx_rst,
    output wire tx_clk,
    output wire tx_rst,

    /*
     * AXI input
     */
    input  wire [7:0] tx_axis_tdata,
    input  wire       tx_axis_tvalid,
    output wire       tx_axis_tready,
    input  wire       tx_axis_tlast,
    input  wire       tx_axis_tuser,

    /*
     * AXI output
     */
    output wire [7:0] rx_axis_tdata,
    output wire       rx_axis_tvalid,
    output wire       rx_axis_tlast,
    output wire       rx_axis_tuser,

    /*
     * MII interface
     */
    input  wire       mii_rx_clk,
    input  wire [3:0] mii_rxd,
    input  wire       mii_rx_dv,
    input  wire       mii_rx_er,
    input  wire       mii_tx_clk,
    output wire [3:0] mii_txd,
    output wire       mii_tx_en,
    output wire       mii_tx_er,

    /*
     * Status
     */
    output wire tx_start_packet,
    output wire tx_error_underflow,
    output wire rx_start_packet,
    output wire rx_error_bad_frame,
    output wire rx_error_bad_fcs,

    /*
     * Configuration
     */
    input wire [7:0] ifg_delay
);

  wire [3:0] mac_mii_rxd;
  wire       mac_mii_rx_dv;
  wire       mac_mii_rx_er;
  wire [3:0] mac_mii_txd;
  wire       mac_mii_tx_en;
  wire       mac_mii_tx_er;

  mii_phy_if #(
      .TARGET(TARGET),
      .CLOCK_INPUT_STYLE(CLOCK_INPUT_STYLE)
  ) mii_phy_if_inst (
      .rst(rst),

      .mac_mii_rx_clk(rx_clk),
      .mac_mii_rx_rst(rx_rst),
      .mac_mii_rxd(mac_mii_rxd),
      .mac_mii_rx_dv(mac_mii_rx_dv),
      .mac_mii_rx_er(mac_mii_rx_er),
      .mac_mii_tx_clk(tx_clk),
      .mac_mii_tx_rst(tx_rst),
      .mac_mii_txd(mac_mii_txd),
      .mac_mii_tx_en(mac_mii_tx_en),
      .mac_mii_tx_er(mac_mii_tx_er),

      .phy_mii_rx_clk(mii_rx_clk),
      .phy_mii_rxd(mii_rxd),
      .phy_mii_rx_dv(mii_rx_dv),
      .phy_mii_rx_er(mii_rx_er),
      .phy_mii_tx_clk(mii_tx_clk),
      .phy_mii_txd(mii_txd),
      .phy_mii_tx_en(mii_tx_en),
      .phy_mii_tx_er(mii_tx_er)
  );

  eth_mac_1g #(
      .ENABLE_PADDING  (ENABLE_PADDING),
      .MIN_FRAME_LENGTH(MIN_FRAME_LENGTH)
  ) eth_mac_1g_inst (
      .tx_clk(tx_clk),
      .tx_rst(tx_rst),
      .rx_clk(rx_clk),
      .rx_rst(rx_rst),
      .tx_axis_tdata(tx_axis_tdata),
      .tx_axis_tvalid(tx_axis_tvalid),
      .tx_axis_tready(tx_axis_tready),
      .tx_axis_tlast(tx_axis_tlast),
      .tx_axis_tuser(tx_axis_tuser),
      .rx_axis_tdata(rx_axis_tdata),
      .rx_axis_tvalid(rx_axis_tvalid),
      .rx_axis_tlast(rx_axis_tlast),
      .rx_axis_tuser(rx_axis_tuser),
      .gmii_rxd(mac_mii_rxd),
      .gmii_rx_dv(mac_mii_rx_dv),
      .gmii_rx_er(mac_mii_rx_er),
      .gmii_txd(mac_mii_txd),
      .gmii_tx_en(mac_mii_tx_en),
      .gmii_tx_er(mac_mii_tx_er),
      .rx_clk_enable(1'b1),
      .tx_clk_enable(1'b1),
      .rx_mii_select(1'b1),
      .tx_mii_select(1'b1),
      .tx_start_packet(tx_start_packet),
      .tx_error_underflow(tx_error_underflow),
      .rx_start_packet(rx_start_packet),
      .rx_error_bad_frame(rx_error_bad_frame),
      .rx_error_bad_fcs(rx_error_bad_fcs),
      .ifg_delay(ifg_delay)
  );

endmodule

module autovcoder_007728 (
    din,
    rd_clk,
    rd_en,
    rst,
    wr_clk,
    wr_en,
    almost_full,
    dout,
    empty,

);


  input [71 : 0] din;

      .C_COMMON_CLOCK(0),
      .C_COUNT_TYPE(0),

      .C_HAS_WR_ACK(0),
      .C_HAS_WR_DATA_COUNT(0),
      .C_HAS_WR_RST(0),
      .C_IMPLEMENTATION_TYPE(2),
      .C_INIT_WR_PNTR_VAL(0),
      .C_MEMORY_TYPE(1),
      .C_MIF_FILE_NAME("BlankString"),
      .C_OPTIMIZATION_MODE(0),
      .C_OVERFLOW_LOW(0),
      .C_PRELOAD_LATENCY(0),
      .C_PRELOAD_REGS(1),
      .C_PRIM_FIFO_TYPE("512x72"),
      .C_PROG_EMPTY_THRESH_ASSERT_VAL(4),

      .C_PROG_EMPTY_TYPE(0),
      .C_PROG_FULL_THRESH_ASSERT_VAL(253),
      .C_PROG_FULL_THRESH_NEGATE_VAL(252),
      .C_PROG_FULL_TYPE(0),
      .C_RD_DATA_COUNT_WIDTH(7),
      .C_RD_DEPTH(512),
      .C_RD_FREQ(100),
      .C_RD_PNTR_WIDTH(9),

      .C_WR_ACK_LOW(0),

      .C_WR_DEPTH(256),
      .C_WR_FREQ(100),
      .C_WR_PNTR_WIDTH(8),
      .C_WR_RESPONSE_LATENCY(1)
  ) inst (
      .DIN(din),
      .RD_CLK(rd_clk),
      .RD_EN(rd_en),
      .RST(rst),
      .WR_CLK(wr_clk),
      .WR_EN(wr_en),
      .ALMOST_FULL(almost_full),

files.fm_rtl_rtlpp_03060.tcl:
# Formality RTL vs RTL: combinational equivalence (no netlist, no technology library).
# Golden and revised are Verilog RTL only. Remote layout: ./rtl/golden.v, ./rtl/revised.v.
# Placeholder replaced by verification_tools.run_lec_rtl_remote: TOP_NAME
set TOP_NAME "rtlpp_03060"

read_verilog -r ./rtl/golden.v
set_top ${TOP_NAME}

read_verilog -i ./rtl/revised.v
set_top ${TOP_NAME}

match
verify
exit

files.sec_rtlpp_03512.tcl:
# JasperGold SEC: sequential equivalence (golden vs revised RTL).
# Placeholders replaced by verification_tools.run_sec_remote:
#   rtlpp_03512.v0, rtlpp_03512.v1, rtlpp_03512, aclk, -none
set DESIGN_NAME_GOLDEN "rtlpp_03512.v0"
set DESIGN_NAME "rtlpp_03512.v1"
set TOP_NAME "rtlpp_03512"


clear -all
check_sec -analyze -spec -sv ./input/rtl/${DESIGN_NAME_GOLDEN}.v
check_sec -analyze -imp -sv ./input/rtl/${DESIGN_NAME}.v
check_sec -elaborate -spec -top ${TOP_NAME} -disable_auto_bbox
check_sec -elaborate -imp -top ${TOP_NAME} -disable_auto_bbox
# check_sec -setup clock -infer reset -none
check_sec -setup 
check_sec -map -auto
clock aclk 
reset -none
check_sec -gen
# check_sec -prove -strategy design_style -design_style_type clock_gating
# check_sec -prove
check_sec -prove -strategy proof

files.autovcoder_145665.v:
module autovcoder_145665(
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input start_ch1,
    input start_ch2,
    input [7:0] src_addr_ch1,
    input [7:0] src_addr_ch2,
    input [7:0] dest_addr_ch1,
    input [7:0] dest_addr_ch2,
    input [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out_ch1,
    output reg [7:0] data_out_ch2,
    output reg done_ch1,
    output reg done_ch2
);
    reg [1:0] state; // 2-bit state register
    parameter IDLE = 2'b00, TRANSFER_CH1 = 2'b01, TRANSFER_CH2 = 2'b10;

    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            state <= IDLE;
            data_out_ch1 <= 0;
            data_out_ch2 <= 0;
            done_ch1 <= 0;
            done_ch2 <= 0;
        end else begin
            case (state)
                IDLE: begin
                    if (start_ch1) begin
                        state <= TRANSFER_CH1;
                        done_ch1 <= 0;
                    end else if (start_ch2) begin
                        state <= TRANSFER_CH2;
                        done_ch2 <= 0;
                    end
                end
                TRANSFER_CH1: begin
                    data_out_ch1 <= data_in; // Simulate data transfer
                    done_ch1 <= 1;
                    state <= IDLE; // Go back to idle state
                end
                TRANSFER_CH2: begin
                    data_out_ch2 <= data_in; // Simulate data transfer
                    done_ch2 <= 1;
                    state <= IDLE; // Go back to idle state
                end
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule

files.origen_067385.v:
module origen_067385 #(
    parameter buf_length = 16,
    parameter DATA_WIDTH = 32,
    parameter DATA_SELECT = 4
) (
    input wire clk,
    input wire resetn,
    input wire [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] data,
    input wire [$clog2(buf_length)-1:0] wptr,
    input wire wptr_valid,
    input wire [DATA_SELECT-1:0] wtrb,
    input wire valid,
    output wire [DATA_WIDTH*buf_length-1:0] data_pack
);

    localparam buf_length_bits = $clog2(buf_length);
    
    reg [DATA_WIDTH-1:0] buffer [0:buf_length-1];
    reg [buf_length_bits-1:0] buf_ptr;

    genvar i;
    generate
        for (i = 0; i < buf_length; i = i + 1) begin : data_pack_gen
            assign data_pack[DATA_WIDTH*i +: DATA_WIDTH] = buffer[i];
        end
    endgenerate

    integer k;
    always @(posedge clk or negedge resetn) begin
        if (!resetn) begin
            for (k = 0; k < buf_length; k = k + 1) begin
                buffer[k] <= {DATA_WIDTH{1'b0}};
            end
            buf_ptr <= {buf_length_bits{1'b0}};
        end else if (valid) begin
            if (wptr_valid) begin
                for (k = 0; k < DATA_SELECT; k = k + 1) begin
                    if (wtrb[k]) begin
                        buffer[wptr][k*(DATA_WIDTH/DATA_SELECT) +: DATA_WIDTH/DATA_SELECT] <= 
                            data[k*(DATA_WIDTH/DATA_SELECT) +: DATA_WIDTH/DATA_SELECT];
                    end
                end
            end else begin
                for (k = 0; k < DATA_SELECT; k = k + 1) begin
                    if (wtrb[k]) begin
                        buffer[buf_ptr][k*(DATA_WIDTH/DATA_SELECT) +: DATA_WIDTH/DATA_SELECT] <= 
                            data[k*(DATA_WIDTH/DATA_SELECT) +: DATA_WIDTH/DATA_SELECT];
                    end
                end
                buf_ptr <= (buf_ptr == buf_length - 1) ? {buf_length_bits{1'b0}} : buf_ptr + 1'b1;
            end
        end
    end

endmodule

files.origen_192504.v:
module origen_192504(
    input clock,
    input [3:0] first4,
    input [3:0] second4,
    input [3:0] third4,
    input [3:0] fourth4,
    output reg [6:0] seven_seg1,
    output reg [3:0] Activate
);

reg [1:0] counter;
reg [3:0] in_num;

always @(posedge clock) begin
    counter <= counter + 1;
end

always @(*) begin
    case (counter)
        2'b00: begin
            in_num = first4;
            Activate = 4'b0111;
        end
        2'b01: begin
            in_num = second4;
            Activate = 4'b1011;
        end
        2'b10: begin
            in_num = third4;
            Activate = 4'b1101;
        end
        2'b11: begin
            in_num = fourth4;
            Activate = 4'b1110;
        end
    endcase
end

always @(*) begin
    case (in_num)
        4'b0000: seven_seg1 = 7'b1000000; // 0
        4'b0001: seven_seg1 = 7'b1111001; // 1
        4'b0010: seven_seg1 = 7'b0100100; // 2
        4'b0011: seven_seg1 = 7'b0110000; // 3
        4'b0100: seven_seg1 = 7'b0011001; // 4
        4'b0101: seven_seg1 = 7'b0010010; // 5
        4'b0110: seven_seg1 = 7'b0000010; // 6
        4'b0111: seven_seg1 = 7'b1111000; // 7
        4'b1000: seven_seg1 = 7'b0000000; // 8
        4'b1001: seven_seg1 = 7'b0010000; // 9
        default: seven_seg1 = 7'b1000000; // 0
    endcase
end

endmodule

module rtlpp_03956 (
                              
                               clock_source,
                               global_reset_n,

                              
                               mem_addr,
                               mem_ba,
                               mem_cas_n,
                               mem_cke,
                               mem_clk,
                               mem_clk_n,
                               mem_cs_n,
                               mem_dm,
                               mem_dq,
                               mem_dqs,
                               mem_dqsn,
                               mem_odt,
                               mem_ras_n,
                               mem_reset_n,
                               mem_we_n,
                               pnf,
                               pnf_per_byte,
                               test_complete,
                               test_status
                            )
;

  output  [ 13: 0] mem_addr;
  output  [  2: 0] mem_ba;
  output           mem_cas_n;
  output  [  0: 0] mem_cke;
  inout   [  0: 0] mem_clk;
  inout   [  0: 0] mem_clk_n;
  output  [  0: 0] mem_cs_n;
  output  [  3: 0] mem_dm;
  inout   [ 31: 0] mem_dq;
  inout   [  3: 0] mem_dqs;
  inout   [  3: 0] mem_dqsn;
  output  [  0: 0] mem_odt;
  output           mem_ras_n;
  output           mem_reset_n;
  output           mem_we_n;
  output           pnf;
  output  [ 15: 0] pnf_per_byte;
  output           test_complete;
  output  [  7: 0] test_status;
  input            clock_source;
  input            global_reset_n;

  wire    [  0: 0] cs_n;
  wire             dll_reference_clk_sig;
  wire    [  5: 0] dqs_delay_ctrl_export_sig;
  wire             local_burstbegin_sig;
  wire             mem_aux_full_rate_clk;
  wire             mem_aux_half_rate_clk;
  wire    [ 24: 0] mem_local_addr;
  wire    [ 15: 0] mem_local_be;
  wire    [  9: 0] mem_local_col_addr;
  wire             mem_local_cs_addr;
  wire    [127: 0] mem_local_rdata;
  wire             mem_local_rdata_valid;
  wire             mem_local_read_req;
  wire             mem_local_ready;
  wire    [  5: 0] mem_local_size;
  wire    [127: 0] mem_local_wdata;
  wire             mem_local_write_req;
  wire             phy_clk;
  wire             reset_phy_clk_n;
  wire             tie_high;
  wire             tie_low;

  assign mem_cs_n = cs_n;
  assign tie_high = 1'b1;
  assign tie_low = 1'b0;

  assign mem_local_addr[7 : 0] = mem_local_col_addr[9 : 2];

  ddr3_int_internal_logic ddr3_int_inst
    (
      .aux_full_rate_clk (mem_aux_full_rate_clk),
      .aux_half_rate_clk (mem_aux_half_rate_clk),
      .dll_reference_clk (dll_reference_clk_sig),
      .dqs_delay_ctrl_export (dqs_delay_ctrl_export_sig),
      .global_reset_n (global_reset_n),
      .local_address (mem_local_addr),
      .local_be (mem_local_be),
      .local_burstbegin (local_burstbegin_sig),
      .local_init_done (),
      .local_rdata (mem_local_rdata),
      .local_rdata_valid (mem_local_rdata_valid),
      .local_read_req (mem_local_read_req),
      .local_ready (mem_local_ready),
      .local_refresh_ack (),
      .local_size (mem_local_size),
      .local_wdata (mem_local_wdata),
      .local_wdata_req (),
      .local_write_req (mem_local_write_req),

#   clk -> "clk" or "clk -both_edges" for dual-edge designs
set DESIGN_NAME_GOLDEN "origen_113001.v0"
set DESIGN_NAME "origen_113001.v1"
set TOP_NAME "origen_113001"


clear -all
check_sec -analyze -spec -sv ./input/rtl/${DESIGN_NAME_GOLDEN}.v
check_sec -analyze -imp -sv ./input/rtl/${DESIGN_NAME}.v
check_sec -elaborate -spec -top ${TOP_NAME} -disable_auto_bbox
check_sec -elaborate -imp -top ${TOP_NAME} -disable_auto_bbox
# check_sec -setup clock -infer reset -none
check_sec -setup 
check_sec -map -auto
clock clk 
reset reset
check_sec -gen
# check_sec -prove -strategy design_style -design_style_type clock_gating
# check_sec -prove
check_sec -prove -strategy proof
